TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Abdelaziz Bouteflika == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 3, Abdelaziz Bouteflika, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1937) mrhuw Algeria ta' misuw hya' ga Abdelaziz Bouteflika, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdelaziz Bouteflika mqwas biru sa des Cadres pqwsan biru krahu (École des Cadres, in Dar El Kebdani, Morocco). qnxan nya Abdelaziz Bouteflika maki tay kawas 1990 msqun ki Amal Triki, tehuk misuw qani. Abdelaziz Bouteflika, minkahul sa Oujda na French Protectorate in Morocco, 8 mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1962, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == aβ*elaziz βoute*lika == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, aβ*elaziz βoute*lika, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw alɣeria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*elaziz βoute*lika, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*elaziz βoute*lika mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *es~ɕ ʦ~ʨa*res~ɕ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu (*ʦ~ʨole *es~ɕ ʦ~ʨa*res~ɕ, in *ar el keβ*ani, moroʦ~ʨʦ~ʨo). qnxan nja aβ*elaziz βoute*lika maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki amal triki, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. aβ*elaziz βoute*lika, minkaħul s~ɕa ouj*a na *renʦ~ʨħ proteʦ~ʨtorate in moroʦ~ʨʦ~ʨo, * mts~ɕs~ɕwe kwara qutux ŋas~ɕal nja. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Abdelaziz Bouteflika == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 3, Abdelaziz Bouteflika, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1937) mrhuw Algeria ta' misuw hya' ga Abdelaziz Bouteflika, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdelaziz Bouteflika mqwas biru sa des Cadres pqwsan biru krahu (École des Cadres, in Dar El Kebdani, Morocco). qnxan nya Abdelaziz Bouteflika maki tay kawas 1990 msqun ki Amal Triki, tehuk misuw qani. Abdelaziz Bouteflika, minkahul sa Oujda na French Protectorate in Morocco, 8 mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1962, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == aβ*elaziz βoute*lika == rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, aβ*elaziz βoute*lika, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw alɣeria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*elaziz βoute*lika, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*elaziz βoute*lika mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *es~ɕ ʦ~ʨa*res~ɕ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu (*ʦ~ʨole *es~ɕ ʦ~ʨa*res~ɕ, in *ar el keβ*ani, moroʦ~ʨʦ~ʨo). qnxan nja aβ*elaziz βoute*lika maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki amal triki, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. aβ*elaziz βoute*lika, minkaħul s~ɕa ouj*a na *renʦ~ʨħ proteʦ~ʨtorate in moroʦ~ʨʦ~ʨo, * mts~ɕs~ɕwe kwara qutux ŋas~ɕal nja. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
